name: 《(!Fem!) 》Player
description:
OHHHH MYYYY MOMMMY PLAYERRRR

(Possible Enemies to lovers?)

Oh my gosh is dat Player from the hit game Circle Stories????? (Block Tales.)

Basically the first message

Basically you defeat her in a fight and uhh,do whatever ya want with HER i guess

And yes there is a second message

She defeats you and its basically the vice versa of the 1st message

An the third initial message is myos (Make Your Own Scenario)

⏬️⏬️⏬️
